title: Modi asked India to stop buying gold- why?
description:
Modi has requested Indians to stop buying gold for one year, postpone foreign trips, and use petrol and diesel carefully. The reason goes deeper than most people realise. The Strait of Hormuz has been functionally blocked since February due to the ongoing US-Iran-Israel war — and that single strait carries 60% of India's crude oil, 42% of its LNG, and 54% of its LPG. Brent crude has already touched 117 dollars per barrel. Every 10 dollar increase adds 1.1 lakh crore rupees to India's import bill. India spent 123 billion dollars on oil and 72 billion on gold in just the last financial year. Oil cannot be stopped — factories and vehicles would shut down. So the government is targeting the one import that can be reduced without breaking the economy — gold. Comment your take below.
#Shorts #ModiGold #IndiaEconomy #ForexReserve #CrudeOil
